title: Key Definitions of Payment System Industry Regulations
summary: List of definitions of terms used in this Board of Governors Member Regulation, including Payment System, PSP, PJP, PIP, Source of Funds, and others.
contains: Payment system
Payment System Service Provider (PSP)
Payment Service Provider (PJP)
Payment System Infrastructure Operator (PIP)
Source of Funds for Payment
Digital Financial Services (DFI)
Self-Regulatory Organization (SRO)
TIKMI
Float funds

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Key Regulatory Definitions of the Payment Systems Industry'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Payment System Industry Setting Key Definitions'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Key Definitions of Payment System Industry Regulations'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Electronic Money Value Limit
summary: Electronic money value limit: unregistered max IDR 2 million (deposits), IDR 20 million (transactions/month); registered max IDR 20 million (deposits), IDR 40 million (transactions/month).
contains: Unregistered electronic money: maximum deposit IDR 2,000,000, monthly transaction IDR 20,000,000
Registered electronic money: maximum deposit IDR 20,000,000, monthly transaction IDR 40,000,000
Incoming transactions are counted towards the transaction limit
Exceptions for Goods and Services Provider accounts

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Electronic Money Value Limits'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize the 'Electronic Money Value Limit'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Electronic Money Value Limit'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Obligation to Place Float Funds
summary: PJP issuing electronic money is required to place float funds: minimum 30% in KBMI 4 bank cash/giro, maximum 70% in securities/CFI.
contains: Bank KBMI 4: minimum 30% on cash
Non-KBMI 4 and LSB banks: minimum 30% on KBMI 4 bank current accounts
Maximum 70% on Government/BI securities or BI account
Recording of float funds in liability posts
Float funds are user assets (trusted funds)

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Prioritize budget allocation and strategic approval for 'Float Fund Placement Obligations'. Make sure the security ROI is clear.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Float Fund Placement Obligations'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Float Fund Placement Obligations'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Closed Loop Electronic Money Issuance Permit
summary: Closed loop electronic money issuers with float funds >= IDR 1 billion are required to have a PJP permit. Risk management & consumer protection is mandatory.
contains: Float funds >= IDR 1,000,000,000 require PJP permission
Multiple closed loop: the amount of float funds is accumulated
Implementation of risk management and consumer protection is mandatory
BI has the authority to carry out inspections on issuers < IDR 1 billion
LSB may continue during the permit process with restrictions

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Closed Loop Electronic Money Issuance License'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Closed Loop Electronic Money Issuance Permit'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Closed Loop Electronic Money Issuance Permit'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Issuance of Digital Financial Services (LKD)
summary: PJP, an electronic money issuer, can become an LKD organizer through collaboration with agents. Must obtain BI approval.
contains: Collaboration with LKD agents (Indonesian business entities/individuals)
Aspects: risk management, assets & capital, APU/CFT, information systems, complaint monitoring
LKD agents must have financial capabilities and pass due diligence
PJP can only work with agents who meet the criteria

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Digital Financial Services (DFI) Issuance'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Digital Financial Services (LKD) Issuance'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Digital Financial Services (DFI) Issuance'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: National Standard for Payment Instruments Using Cards
summary: PJPs that process card transactions are required to use national standards for payment instruments using cards established by Bank Indonesia.
contains: Obligation to use national standards
The implementing stages are determined by BI
Includes credit cards, debit cards and ATM cards

roleTranslations.bod: Mode Board: Provide strategic oversight of the 'National Standard for Card Payment Instruments'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize the 'National Standard for Payment Instruments Using Cards'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'National Standards for Card Payment Instruments'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Innovation Trial Framework (Regulatory Sandbox)
summary: Innovation trial framework: principles (criteria-based, transparency, proportionality, fairness, equality, forward looking), maximum duration 6+6 months, results status.
contains: Principles: criteria-based process, transparency, proportionality, fairness, equality, forward looking
Duration: maximum 6 months, can be extended 1x6 months
Source: PSP request/other party or BI initiative
Innovation centers can be formed or appointed by other parties
Test result status: successful or unsuccessful
BI may set certain policies during the test

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of the 'Innovation Pilot Framework (Regulatory Sandbox)'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize the 'Innovation Testing Framework (Regulatory Sandbox)'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for the 'Innovation Trial Framework (Regulatory Sandbox)'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Innovation Trial Report Requirements
summary: Supporting documents for trial application: participant profile, innovation data (features, benefits, risks), trial scenario, scope, time period.
contains: Profiles of all prospective participants (entities, contact persons)
Innovation data: product features, activities, services, business models, innovation elements, benefits
Aspects of risk management, information security, APU/CFT, infrastructure readiness
Proposed test scenarios
Scope: limit on number of users, nominal transactions, regional limits
Implementation period

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Innovation Trial Report Requirements'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Innovation Trial Report Requirements'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Innovation Trial Report Requirements'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Sharia Electronic Money
summary: The administration of electronic money by sharia banks/business units/LSBs must comply with sharia principles. Placement of float funds in the current account of the sharia business unit of KBMI 4 bank.
contains: In accordance with PADG provisions as long as they do not conflict with sharia principles
Placement of float funds in the current account of the sharia business unit of KBMI 4 bank
Or a sharia bank that has an ownership relationship with KBMI 4 bank
BI can adjust its float fund placement policy

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Sharia Electronic Money'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Sharia Electronic Money'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'Sharia Electronic Money'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Receiving and Handling Complaints
summary: Bank Indonesia can receive and submit consumer complaints regarding the implementation of the payment system to PSP for follow-up.
contains: Consumer complaints can be submitted to BI
BI will submit complaints to the relevant PSP
PSP is obliged to follow up and report
Handling time limits are in accordance with applicable regulations

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Complaint Reception and Handling'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Complaint Reception and Handling'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'Reception and Handling of Complaints'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.
